Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.core

Class ErsapBase

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsg
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.core.ErsapBase
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
Direct Known Subclasses:
CommandDebugger
public class ErsapBase extends org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsg
ERSAP base class providing methods build services, service container and orchestrator.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsg

    myId, myName

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ErsapBase(ErsapComponent me, ErsapComponent frontEnd)
    A ERSAP component that can send and receives messages.

  • Constructor Details

    • ErsapBase

      public ErsapBase(ErsapComponent me, ErsapComponent frontEnd)
      A ERSAP component that can send and receives messages.
      Parameters:
      me - definition of the component
      frontEnd - definition of the front-end

  • Method Details

    • getErsapHome

      public String getErsapHome()
      Get ERSAP_HOME env variable.
      Returns:
      the path to the ersap_home defined

    • getMe

      public ErsapComponent getMe()
      Returns the definition of this component.
      Returns:
      ErsapComponent

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns the description of this component.
      Returns:
      ErsapComponent description

    • cacheLocalConnection

      public void cacheLocalConnection() throws ErsapException
      Stores a connection to the default proxy in the connection pool.
      Throws:
      ErsapException - if a connection could not be created or connected

    • send

      public void send(ErsapComponent component, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgMessage msg) throws org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException
      Sends a message to the address of the given ERSAP component.
      Parameters:
      component - the component that shall receive the message
      msg - the message to be published
      Throws:
      org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException - if the message could not be sent

    • send

      public void send(ErsapComponent component, String requestText) throws org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException
      Sends a string to the given ERSAP component.
      Parameters:
      component - the component that shall receive the message
      requestText - string of the message
      Throws:
      org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException - if the message could not be sent

    • send

      public void send(org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgConnection con, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgMessage msg) throws org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException
      Sends a message using the specified connection.
      Parameters:
      con - the connection that shall be used to publish the message
      msg - the message to be published
      Throws:
      org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException - if the message could not be sent

    • send

      public void send(org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgMessage msg) throws org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException
      Sends a message to the address of this ERSAP component.
      Parameters:
      msg - the message to be published
      Throws:
      org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException - if the message could not be sent

    • send

      public void send(String msgText) throws org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException
      Sends a text message to this ERSAP component.
      Parameters:
      msgText - string of the message
      Throws:
      org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException - if the message could not be sent

    • syncSend

      public org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgMessage syncSend(ErsapComponent component, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgMessage msg, long timeout) throws org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException, TimeoutException
      Synchronous sends a message to the address of the given ERSAP component.
      Parameters:
      component - the component that shall receive the message
      msg - the message to be published
      timeout - in milliseconds
      Returns:
      xMsgMessage
      Throws:
      org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException - if the message could not be sent
      TimeoutException - if a response was not received

    • syncSend

      public org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgMessage syncSend(ErsapComponent component, String requestText, long timeout) throws org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException, TimeoutException
      Synchronous sends a string to the given ERSAP component.
      Parameters:
      component - the component that shall receive the message
      requestText - string of the message
      timeout - in milli seconds
      Returns:
      xMsgMessage
      Throws:
      org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException - if the message could not be sent
      TimeoutException - if a response was not received

    • listen

      public org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgSubscription listen(ErsapComponent component, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgCallBack callback) throws ErsapException
      Listens for messages published to the given component.
      Parameters:
      component - a component defining the topic of interest
      callback - the callback action
      Returns:
      a handler to the subscription
      Throws:
      ErsapException - if the subscription could not be started

    • listen

      public org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgSubscription listen(ErsapComponent component, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgTopic topic, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgCallBack callback) throws ErsapException
      Listens for messages of given topic published to the address of the given component.
      Parameters:
      component - a component defining the address to connect
      topic - topic of interest
      callback - the callback action
      Returns:
      a handler to the subscription
      Throws:
      ErsapException - if the subscription could not be started

    • listen

      public org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgSubscription listen(org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgTopic topic, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgCallBack callback) throws ErsapException
      Listens for messages of given topic published to the address of this component.
      Parameters:
      topic - topic of interest
      callback - the callback action
      Returns:
      a handler to the subscription
      Throws:
      ErsapException - if the subscription could not be started

    • stopListening

      public void stopListening(org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgSubscription handle)
      Stops listening to a subscription defined by the handler.
      Parameters:
      handle - the subscription handler

    • stopCallbacks

      public void stopCallbacks()
      Terminates all callbacks.

    • register

      public void register(org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgTopic topic, String description) throws ErsapException
      Registers this component with the front-end as subscriber to the given topic.
      Parameters:
      topic - the subscribed topic
      description - a description of the component
      Throws:
      ErsapException - if registration failed

    • removeRegistration

      public void removeRegistration(org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgTopic topic) throws ErsapException
      Remove the registration of this component from the front-end as subscriber to the given topic.
      Parameters:
      topic - the subscribed topic
      Throws:
      ErsapException - if removing the registration failed

    • discover

      public Set<org.jlab.coda.xmsg.data.xMsgRegRecord> discover(String regHost, int regPort, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgTopic topic) throws IOException, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException
      Retrieves ERSAP actor registration information from the xMsg registrar service.
      Parameters:
      regHost - registrar server host
      regPort - registrar server port
      topic - the canonical name of an actor: xMsgTopic
      Returns:
      set of xMsgR.xMsgRegistration objects
      Throws:
      IOException - exception
      org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException - exception

    • discover

      public Set<org.jlab.coda.xmsg.data.xMsgRegRecord> discover(String regHost, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgTopic topic) throws IOException, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException
      Retrieves ERSAP actor registration information from the xMsg registrar service, assuming registrar is running using the default port.
      Parameters:
      regHost - registrar server host
      topic - the canonical name of an actor: xMsgTopic
      Returns:
      set of xMsgR.xMsgRegistration objects
      Throws:
      IOException - exception
      org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException - exception

    • discover

      public Set<org.jlab.coda.xmsg.data.xMsgRegRecord> discover(org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgTopic topic) throws IOException, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException
      Retrieves ERSAP actor registration information from the xMsg registrar service, assuming registrar is running on a local host, using the default port.
      Parameters:
      topic - the canonical name of an actor: xMsgTopic
      Returns:
      set of xMsgR.xMsgRegistration objects
      Throws:
      IOException - exception
      org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException - exception

    • getRegAddress

      public static org.jlab.coda.xmsg.net.xMsgRegAddress getRegAddress(ErsapComponent fe)

    • pingDpe

      public org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgMessage pingDpe(ErsapComponent component, int timeout) throws IOException, org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException, TimeoutException
      Sync asks DPE to report.
      Parameters:
      component - dpe as a ErsapComponent.dpe() object
      timeout - sync request timeout
      Returns:
      message xMsgMessage back from a dpe.
      Throws:
      IOException - exception
      org.jlab.coda.xmsg.excp.xMsgException - exception
      TimeoutException - exception

    • getFrontEnd

      public ErsapComponent getFrontEnd()
      Returns the reference to the front-end DPE.
      Returns:
      ErsapComponent object

    • setFrontEnd

      public void setFrontEnd(ErsapComponent frontEnd)
      Sets a DPE ERSAP component as a front-end.
      Parameters:
      frontEnd - ErsapComponent object
